title: diaphananthe bidens
intro: Diaphananthe bidens, also known as the orchid with the "two-winged" or "bidentate" lip, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in West Africa, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and is also used to support digestive health and alleviate respiratory issues. Diaphananthe bidens can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
